text:
(1) The ideas of development: the market can be developed and mar-
                                                                                                                        ket development can be promoted. Market development must be
                                                                                                                        people-oriented and based on institutions as the main body. Away from the financing main body with creativity and good
                                                                                                                        credit structure, all financial activities will lack their source. Development-oriented finance attaches great emphasis on
                                                                                                                        strengthening the development of financial market, giving full
                                                                                                                        play of people’s creativity, developing people’s inherent poten-
                                                                                                                        tial, developing government departments’ organizational advan-
                                                                                                                        tages and various resources, and adhering to rearing the
                                                                                                                        blood-making function of main credit body so as to make them
                                                                                                                        have a long vitality. (2) The idea of planning ahead: planning is a kind of thought of
                                                                                                                        development. Scientific development planning is a combination of
                                                                                                                        knowledge and practice: “Science” is the theory of knowledge
                                                                                                                        which is mainly reflected on the relationship between man and
                                                                                                                        awareness of nature, awareness of country’s actual conditions,
                                                                                                                        and the understanding of its own path to achieve success by eco-
                                                                                                                        nomically lagged countries.

“Development” is the practice theory,
                                                                                                                        mainly reflected in the application of science and technology, not
